headline: BMO Is First Bank to Join CME's Tokenized Cash Platform on Google Cloud
summary: BMO joins CME Group and Google Cloud to enable 24/7 tokenized cash settlement for institutional clients.

headline: Bank Of Montreal Expands Digital Reach With DollarGPS And Tokenized Cash
summary: Bank of Montreal (TSX:BMO) launched the DollarGPS app in partnership with MSN Holding Limited, aiming to expand digital engagement with U.S. clients. BMO introduced tokenized cash capabilities with CME Group and Google Cloud to support real time margin management in 24/7 markets. These moves extend BMO's digital product set into consumer budgeting tools and institutional-grade blockchain based settlement. For a large North American bank like TSX:BMO, the push into consumer apps and...

headline: Bank of Montreal Plans Tokenized Cash Platform
summary: Bank of Montreal plans to launch tokenized cash capabilities that will allow institutional clients to move funds securely at all times.

headline: Borr Drilling to acquire five jack-up rigs from Paratus for $287m
summary: The deal is being financed with a $237m (£176.99m) non-recourse seller’s credit and a $25m cash contribution from both partners.
